Bash(sqlite3 /Users/austin.hsieh/temp/CCStockWorkEnv/data/ccstockworkenv.db "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS monthly_revenue \(
    ticker      TEXT NOT NULL,
    market      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TW',
    year        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    month       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    revenue     INTEGER,
    yoy_pct     REAL,
    mom_pct     REAL,
    cum_revenue INTEGER,
    cum_yoy_pct REAL,
    created_at  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT \(datetime\('now'\)\),
    PRIMARY KEY \(ticker, market, year, month\)
\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_monthly_rev_ticker ON monthly_revenue\(ticker, market, year DESC, month DESC\);
SELECT 'table created';
")
